narrative: Cooked-meat HACCP CCP-1. Critical limit exceeded: cook ≥71.1°C/15 seconds was not met — measured 64°C for 12 seconds. Product HOLD must be invoked but operator released batch without documented corrective action. Monitoring thermocouple uncalibrated for 14 weeks; product since last good calibration is suspect. Verification record review failed past 7-day window. Reanalysis of HACCP plan not triggered despite repeated failures.
